title: Update validate command coverage output format (human + JSON)
definition_of_done: Human format: 'COVERAGE: N/M cited' (or 'N/M cited (X source-linked, Y accepted-risk)' when accepted-risk>0); JSON format includes coverage object; TestValidateCmd_CoverageOutput_HumanFormat passes; make check green
outcome: validate command coverage output updated: simple 'N/M cited' format, extended with source-linked/accepted-risk breakdown; JSON includes coverage object; TestValidateCmd_CoverageOutput_HumanFormat passes; make check green

notes.msg: Updated validate command coverage output format: human format now outputs 'N/M cited' (simple) or 'N/M cited (X source-linked, Y accepted-risk)' (extended when accepted-risk>0); JSON output now includes coverage object; added TestValidateCmd_CoverageOutput_HumanFormat test with two subtests; make check green (exit 0)
